title: Render Performance
description: Optimize a poorly performing animation by eliminating layout thrash and using compositor-friendly properties

validationRules.message: Box should have will-change: transform for GPU hint

hints.text: The browser can animate transform and opacity on the compositor thread without triggering layout. Properties like width, height, top, and left trigger layout recalculation.
Replace 'left' animation with translateX(), and 'width' changes with scaleX(). Add 'will-change: transform' for the GPU promotion hint.
Use transform: translateX() + scaleX() instead of left + width. Add will-change: transform.
hints.code:
.animated-box { will-change: transform; animation: slide 2s ease-in-out infinite alternate; }
@keyframes slide { from { transform: translateX(0) scaleX(1); } to { transform: translateX(200px) scaleX(1.4); } }
